homepage.textContent: About Us FAQ Request an Appointment English Ελληνικα Français Español Emergency Line (+30) 6944903934 × Home Our Clinic Departments Services About Us Our Staff Info The Patient’s & Visitor’s Guide Health Plans Health Library A-Z Fees & Insurance FAQ Blog Contact MENU Go Fertile Clinic Diagnostic, Gynecological & Obstetrical Care with focus on Fertility Learn More Care from A to Z A holistic approach, from pre-conception to childbirth Learn More Do you know about your fertility? Fertility assessment and counselling for women, men and couples Learn More Welcome to our Clinic We are pleased to welcome you to our clinic and look forward to our meeting with you At our clinic you can expect to receive world class care, but what really sets us apart is our personalized and comprehensive medical approach. Thus, you can be sure that our expert physician specialists and caring staff will provide you with an exceptional health care experience. A MODERN CLINIC WITH A LONG HISTORY Although featuring modern installations and state-of-the-art technology, our history goes back to…1908! Thus, we combine tradition and innovation, extensive experience and cutting-edge knowledge… Checkout our Facilities Patient & Visitor Guide Take a virtual tour to our Medical Center & surroundings More Medical Departments The Backbone of our Clinic FERTILITY More OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY More DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT & ANDROLOGY More HIGH-END EQUIPMENT We provide a wide range of services, including comprehensive laboratory diagnosis and advanced ultrasound imaging, among others. Checkout All Departments Featured Services We cover a big variety of medical services Fertility assessment clinic Learn about your reproductive potential with the Go-Fertile fertility test More Advanced Ultrasound and Radiation-free tubal assessment (3D/4D HyFoSy) With high-end ultrasound equipment More Advanced Laboratory Testing From basic check up to DNA analysis More Checkout All Medical Services Working Hours MONDAY 08:00-21:00 TUESDAY 08:00-21:00 WEDNESDAY 08:00-22:00 THURSDAY 08:00-22:00 FRIDAY 08:00-22:00 SATURDAY upon request Fees & Insurance For your convenience, our Clinic provides direct insurance billing with many greek and international insurance providers and assistance companies. Please contact us for more info. Need a personal health plan? services.textContent: About Us FAQ Request an Appointment English Ελληνικα Français Español Emergency Line (+30) 6944903934 × Home Our Clinic Departments Services About Us Our Staff Info The Patient’s & Visitor’s Guide Health Plans Health Library A-Z Fees & Insurance FAQ Blog Contact MENU All Medical Services Featured by Department Andrology Semen Analysis Sexual dysfunction Sexually transmitted infections Andrology Department (+30) 2103221846 Visit Department Theofanis Angelopoulos, MD Biopathologist More Fertility Fertility diagnosis Initial consultation Go Fertile fertility test Semen Analysis Advanced ultrasound Microbiological assessment Hormonal assessment Tubal patency test: HyFoSy Hysteroscopy Laparoscopy Other advanced tests Personalized counselling Fertility treatments Cycle monitoring Intra-Uterine insemination (IUI) In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection (ICSI) Natural Cycle IVF Modified Natural Cycle IVF Mild Stimulation IVF Options for single women Options for same sex couples Embryo freezing Fertility Preservation Egg freezing Sperm freezing Embryo freezing Ovarian freezing Donation treatments Treatment with donor eggs Treatment with donor sperm Treatment with double donation Surrogacy Other techniques Endometrial scratching Preimplantation genetic screening (PGS) Preimplantation genetic diagnosis (PGD) Fertility Department (+30) 2103221846 Visit Department Liliana Colombero, MD Obstetrician & Gynecologist More Gynaecology & Birth Gynecology Annual exam: breast exam, Test Pap, Test PAP thin prep, ultrasound, vaginal/cervical cultures, other preventive care Hpv typing, vulvoscopy, colposcopy Contraception Sexuality, sexual dysfunction Complementary therapy Fibroids Pelvic pain and dysmenorrhea Endometriosis Benign Gynecological problems Genitourinary infections and Sexually transmitted infections Intraepithelial diseases of the cervix, vagina and vulva Breast disease Laparosocopy – Hysteroscopy Other surgical procedures (Hysterectomy, others) Urogynecology Gynecological Endocrinology: puberty, amenorrhea, endocrine disorders polycycstic ovaries Menopause Oncology Pregnancy Early Pregnancy complications: miscarriage, repeated miscarriages, ectopic pregnancy, termination of pregnancy Pregnancy follow-up Preparation for labor and delivery Natural Birth Cesarean Section High risk pregnancy Obstetrics & Gynecology Department (+30) 2103221846 Visit Department Liliana Colombero, MD Obstetrician & Gynecologist More Diagnostic Laboratory Hematology Thorough evaluation to verify: A problem of the blood components (white blood cells, red blood cells, platelets), Anemia and its cause, Inflammation, A problem of blood clotting, Blood type. Biochemistry Measurement of the various components of the blood, urine or other biological fluids, and their comparison to normal values. Hormones Quantitative measurement of hormones in the blood or urine, and their direct comparison with normal values. Microbiology Examination of all biological fluids by: Culture, Antibiogram, Microscopic examination of a fresh preparation (“wet mount”), Microscopic examination of a stained preparation, in order to detect pathologies such as inflammation and infections. Immunology Quantitative measurement of immunoglobulins for detection of infections, inflammations, allergies, etc., Investigation of autoimmune diseases, Anti-sperm antibodies, Anti-paternal antibodies, Tumour markers, Cytotoxic test. Molecular Biology Detection of infections, Screening for hereditary diseases, Thrombophilia screening, DNA Paternity testing. Toxicology Detection of toxic and narcotic substances. Others Fertility assessment Semen analysis More information at the Fertility Department. Diagnostic Laboratory (+30) 2103221846 Visit Department Theofanis Angelopoulos, MD Biopathologist More Featured Services These are our special exams FERTILITY ASSESSMENT CLINIC Learn about your reproductive potential with the Go-Fertile fertility test More ADVANCED ULTRASOUND AND RADIATION-FREE TUBAL ASSESSMENT (4D HyFoSy) With high-end quipment More ADVANCED LABORATORY TESTING From basic check up to DNA analysis More We specialize in Fertility Learn about your fertility with the Go Fertile test With the Go Fertile test you can: Check your fertility. Get advice on optimising your lifestyle for fertility. Discuss your options with a specialised medical doctor. Who can have the Go Fertile test? The Go-Fertile test is for men, women and couples who wish to know where they stand with their fertility. Additionally, Go-Fertile provides comprehensive diagnosis and counselling. Learn more here Request an evaluation Meeting Want to schedule an appointment? Call us at (+30) 2103221846 or fill in the appointment form...
